label: Stage fail trigger (no thing present)
description: Fails the stage when the required thing is not present within range.

allowanceTicks.label: Allowance ticks
allowanceTicks.description: Number of ticks the condition is allowed to persist before the stage fails.

onlyIfTargetIsOfDef.label: Only if target is of def
onlyIfTargetIsOfDef.description: If set, this trigger only activates when the ritual target is of this ThingDef.

maxDistance.label: Max distance
maxDistance.description: Maximum cell distance within which the required thing must be present. Defaults to 12.

thingDef.label: Thing def
thingDef.description: The ThingDef that must be present within range.
